case_title: JONES , SCHILLER & COMPANY CPA VS BIRNBERG CORY A. ESQ.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JONES , SCHILLER & COMPANY CPA AS TO DEFENDANT BIRNBERG CORY A. ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES , SCHILLER & COMPANY CPA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRNBERG CORY A. ESQ. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BIRNBERG CORY A. ESQ.
